name: nvfp4_gemm_b200_findings
description: NVFP4 GEMM on B200: CUTLASS auto-scheduler already picks optimal schedule (KernelTmaWarpSpecialized1SmNvf4Sm100). Triton tl.dot_scaled works but is 22% slower. For M=128, only 56 blocks across 160 SMs = 35% utilization. Competition winner achieved ~10us, our 11.1us is within 10%. Speed-of-light targets (3.3us) are theoretical.
when_to_apply: FP4 GEMM on B200 with small M. The SM underutilization is the fundamental limit for M<=128.
discovered_from: Two NVFP4 GEMM runs, 247 total tool calls
